name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cup Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Mix and pat into a 10-inch springform pan.
32 ounces CREAM CHEESE (good quality), taken out of Package and warmed in microwave for 2 Minutes on high
5 Jumbo EGGS, shelled and placed in bowl then warmed in microwave for 25 seconds
8 REESE'S PEANUT BUTTER CUPS, chopped into medium-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream the cheese until light.
3. Add sugar and beat some more.
4. Add eggs one at a time and beat after each.
5. Mix in cream, vanilla, and cornstarch.
6. Stir in the chopped Reese's peanut butter cups.
7. Pour into crust.
8. Bake for 1 hour or so until the outside edge is firm and the middle is still soft.
9. Keep a pan of water in the bottom of the oven to keep humidity high and prevent cracking.
10. When done, run a knife around the edge.
11. Cool for several hours.
12. Top with more chopped Reese's peanut butter cups and drizzle with melted chocolate (optional).
13. Optional: Add 1 cup chopped peanuts to the crust or 1/2 cup peanut butter to the cake after eggs and before cream.
